$comment: Full 9-field catalog for Remote Code / Command Injection (previously a null code-review catalog).

patterns.what_to_look_for: Request input flows into a shell/exec/system call or a command string (OS command injection).
source_indicators: backticks / command string built from input
blackbox_indicators: time-delay (sleep) or out-of-band signal on shell metacharacters
evidence_required: a benign time/OOB probe — never a destructive payload
false_positive_checks: argv array form with no shell
patterns.suggested_validation_task: Send a benign time-delay or out-of-band probe (gated by active-poc) and confirm command execution.
patterns.reporting_guidance: Critical; any live impact proof fires ONLY behind the active-poc 3-gate (benign nonce/echo).

patterns.what_to_look_for: Server-side template injection — request data rendered as a template expression.
source_indicators: user input passed as the template string (not the context)
eval-like template engine call with input
blackbox_indicators: template arithmetic (e.g. {{7*7}}) evaluates in the response
false_positive_checks: input is the data context, not the template
patterns.suggested_validation_task: Submit a benign template-arithmetic probe and confirm evaluation.
patterns.reporting_guidance: SSTI frequently escalates to RCE; note the engine and sandbox status.

patterns.what_to_look_for: Unsafe deserialization of attacker-controlled data into language objects (pickle, Marshal, native deserialize, gadget chains).
source_indicators: deserialize/load of request body or cookie
native object deserialization of untrusted input
blackbox_indicators: crafted serialized object triggers an observable side effect
false_positive_checks: safe format (JSON to a plain map)
patterns.suggested_validation_task: Confirm the untrusted source reaches the deserializer; live gadget proof only under active-poc.
patterns.reporting_guidance: Critical; describe the gadget surface and any signing that is or isn't enforced.
